description: KES 737.5 billion SGR debt to Exim Bank of China is unsustainable given current revenue levels of KES 18 billion. Debt service obligations exceed operating cash flows.
mitigationPlan: Engage National Treasury for sovereign debt restructuring; negotiate extended repayment terms with Exim Bank; increase freight volumes through incentive pricing

description: Kenya Airways has negative equity of KES 17 billion. Continued losses without successful restructuring could lead to insolvency and cessation of operations.
mitigationPlan: Execute government recapitalisation plan; implement cost reduction programme; renegotiate aircraft leases; expand profitable routes

description: System losses of 21.5% (technical and non-technical) result in annual revenue leakage of approximately KES 38 billion, threatening financial sustainability.
mitigationPlan: Accelerate smart meter rollout; strengthen anti-theft enforcement; upgrade aging distribution infrastructure

description: Increasing cargo volumes risk port congestion at Mombasa, potentially diverting traffic to Dar es Salaam port and reducing KPA revenues.
mitigationPlan: Accelerate container terminal expansion; implement port community system; extend operating hours to 24/7

description: Climate change-induced drought reduces water levels in reservoirs, cutting hydro generation capacity by up to 40% during dry seasons.
mitigationPlan: Diversify generation mix towards geothermal and wind; invest in reservoir management; develop drought contingency dispatch plans

description: Aging sections of the Mombasa–Nairobi pipeline pose risk of rupture, fuel spills, and environmental contamination, with potential for significant liability.
mitigationPlan: Complete cathodic protection upgrade; implement real-time leak detection system; conduct annual pipeline integrity assessments

description: KBC relies on government subventions that are consistently below operational requirements, resulting in chronic losses and inability to invest in content and technology.
mitigationPlan: Develop commercial revenue streams; launch digital OTT platform; renegotiate government subvention formula under Public Finance Management Act 2012
